symptom_text: A Finance department user reports they cannot connect to the network. Interface GigabitEthernet0/1 shows an err-disabled state; 'show port-security interface g0/1' shows Violation Mode = Shutdown and Security Violation Count = 1.
hidden_root_cause: An extra/unauthorized device (e.g. a small unmanaged switch) was connected to a port configured with 'switchport port-security maximum 1', triggering a violation under the default Shutdown mode.
expected_diagnostic_order: Identify the offending MAC address (show port-security interface).
Physically remove or reconfigure the extra device.
Recover the port: 'shutdown' then 'no shutdown' (required specifically because violation mode is Shutdown — Restrict/Protect modes do not disable the port).
